title: Pan-Seared Mediterranean Fish
description: A Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring flaky fish, topped with a blend of herbs and spices, and served with a squeeze of fresh lemon.
instructions: Season the fish fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the fish fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, until cooked through.
Remove the fish from the oven and squeeze a sliver of lemon juice over each fillet.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top of each fillet.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
